{"query":"Pope Leo XIV Castel Gandolfo concert July 16 2026 official announcement performers program","model":"mako","response_time_ms":2112,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://www.vaticannews.va/en/pope/news/2026-07/castel-gandolfo-to-host-concert-in-honor-of-pope-leo-xiv.html","title":"Castel Gandolfo to host concert in honor of Pope Leo XIV - Vatican News","content":"The Diocese of Albano offers a concert for Pope Leo XIV at Castel Gandolfo, featuring works by Paganini and Bellini, that will take place, with Pope Leo in attendance, on 18 July at the Apostolic Palace of Castel Gandolfo.
The evening, beginning at 9:00 p.m. in the Palace courtyard, is intended as a gesture of affection and communion with the Holy Father.
“The renewed presence of the Holy Father in our diocesan territory has filled our local Church and its people with joy,” said Bishop Vincenzo Viva of Albano.","date":"2 days ago"},{"url":"https://www.catholicworldreport.com/2026/07/16/pope-leo-xiv-to-attend-summer-concert-at-castel-gandolfo/","title":"Pope Leo XIV to attend summer concert at Castel Gandolfo – Catholic World Report","content":"1 day ago — The pontiff, who is on vacation at the lakeside town, will attend a classical concert in his honor on July 18. Pope Leo XIV enjoys the ...Read more
The “Concert in Honor of the Holy Father Leo XIV” will take place in the courtyard of the Apostolic Palace of Castel Gandolfo, where he is staying from July 5–27.
Bishop Vincenzo Viva of Albano, in a July 16 press release from the diocese, described the concert as an expression of the diocese’s joy and closeness to the pope.
The concert will feature classical repertoire by Niccolò Paganini and Vincenzo Bellini.
Pope Leo XIV decided to spend part of this summer on vacation at the Apostolic Palace of Castel Gandolfo after Pope Francis opted not to spend his summers there for his entire 12-year pontificate.
The complex also includes the Pontifical Gardens, including the Borgo Laudato Si’ garden.
The July 18 concert will be Leo’s second public appearance (outside his Sunday Angelus) at Castel Gandolfo so far, following his lunch with the poor in the Borgo Laudato Si’ garden on July 11.
Vatican City, Nov 1, 2018 / 07:44 am (CNA/EWTN News).- If a Christian wants to reach heaven, he or she should ask themselves if they are living for the pleasures of the world, or if they are striving after holiness with all their strength, Pope Francis…"},{"url":"https://aleteia.org/2026/07/17/a-little-summer-music-for-pope-leo-xiv/","title":"A little summer music for Pope Leo XIV this weekend","content":"14 hours ago — The concert will take place on Saturday at 9.00 pm in the courtyard of the Apostolic Palace. Several renowned musicians will be performing.Read more
The local diocese of Castel Gandolfo is organizing a late-evening concert for the Holy Father this weekend, featuring well-known pianist, violinist.
The Pope has been staying at his summer residence since July 5 to take some time to rest.
The local bishop, Vincenzo Viva, stated that this initiative is motivated by the “joy” brought about by the Pope’s return to the Diocese of Albano.
Pianist Rossana Tomassi Golkar will play an excerpt from Vincenzo Bellini’s opera Norma, rewritten especially for her by the Oscar-winning composer Luis Bacalov.
Violinist Marco Rogliano will also perform a piece composed by the virtuoso Niccolò Paganini.
They will be conducted by Pier Carlo Orizio."}]}
